title: Blade's Dungeons
description: A New Vanilla-Styled Type of Dungeon with 100% Randomly Spawning Rooms
body:
# Welcome to Blade's Dungeons!
Have you ever found those small dungeons in your world boring? Blade's Dungeons is here to change that!

From the ground up, I redesigned what a "dungeon" should be within Minecraft. Of course, for those who prefer the original dungeon structures, this mod doesn't alter existing structures. Instead, it adds an entirely NEW & 100% randomly generating dungeon type.

## Example Layout:
![Example Layout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVbcXsJW/images/48486154bc656d822664c39de049528585a4434a.png)
This is just one possible layout, every layout is completely random. Every structure contains a plethora of halls, rooms, stairs, and ladder structures.

## Multi-layered:
![Multi-layered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVbcXsJW/images/5d06f0e73ce54cb14ebb5314c942ccdcd3fc6e1b.png)
The new dungeons can sometimes spawn with multiple layers. Each one is randomly generated. If you're new to exploring the structure, you can look for a set of stairs or a ladder to reach the upper or lower parts of the dungeon.

## Large Mob Room:
![Large Mob Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVbcXsJW/images/089b07ec4cd5c193c17e54c4038fc53f9e76570f.png)
This Large Mob Room Spawns Relatively Rarely. It has 2 Trial Spawners(which spawn either zombies or skeletons), and it contains 2 vaults. It also includes 6 chests full of loot! (filled with the "Treasure" Loot Table)

## Mob Room:
![Normal Mob Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVbcXsJW/images/39c51bf13d700534de1b8fa303ed62de6b219df4.png)
This room is slightly more common than the "Large" Variant. It contains a normal mob spawner and has a Treasure Room attached. All chests in the Mob Room have been looted from a traditional dungeon, however, the chests you can locate in the room to the side of every smaller mob room contain Treasure Loot!

##Treasure Room Example:
![Treasure Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVbcXsJW/images/b83376ead7a8b89899f37e448ad0c89904971bb2.png)
This room is full of several chests filled with valuable loot! And some cobwebs *cough* (don't get stuck).

## Safe Room:
![The Safe Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVbcXsJW/images/ccbd73249225a4f575956935ed92da01c2de9e91.png)
An Example of one of the available safe rooms. If you need a quick stop for a nap, to get away from mobs, or a break from the computer, these common rooms provide a safe getaway. There exist 2 larger variants so you can regroup, strategize, and prepare for your next adventure with friends in these safe havens!

## Bonus:
There are also "Trap Rooms", beware, the chests contain a... surprise. Let's just say the wrong step has explosive consequences.

# FAQ:
  **Question:** Who created this mod?
  
  **Answer:** Me, SemiBlade, I created this mod. I'm a passionate player who's been building structures in games since the Xbox 360 days.

  **Question:** Can I add this mod to a modpack?
  
  **Answer:** You have permission to add this mod to a modpack. As long as you give proper credit (such as a link to this page and giving the author, semiblade, proper attribution), without modification - and as long as the modpack resides on modrinth and/or curseforge.

  **Question:** Can I review this mod for my YouTube channel (or other video hosting platforms) or article?
  
  **Answer:** You have permission to review, comment on, and criticize the mod/data pack, as long as proper credit is given and any download links are directed to the source (for example, here on Modrinth).
  
  **Question:** Can I support the author?
  
  **Answer:** For now, downloading the mod is enough, you are also allowed to promote it as long as any credit is accurately given and you link any downloads to the correct source.

  **Question:** What if I have an Idea or issue?
  
  **Answer:** You can DM me, reply to my posts, or @ me here: https://x.com/SemiBlade


**Not officially affiliated with, sponsored by, or otherwise supported by Minecraft/Mojang/Microsoft.**


## Requirements:
The only required mod is "Fabric API"
https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api

## Alternative Download:
Also available on CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blades-dungeons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blades-dungeons)
